description: Confirm encoding bug is a false alarm (no mojibake in source), add error.tsx boundaries, fix cache revalidation gaps in admin offer/promo-code mutations, and add missing force-dynamic export
steps: ENCODING BUG (Item 3): Search the entire codebase (excluding node_modules and .next) for the character sequence 'a\u0302' or literal mojibake patterns. Confirm that no source files contain mojibake. All UTF-8 special characters are already correct in source. Document this as 'confirmed no fix needed' in the feature findings.

ERROR BOUNDARIES (Item 4): Create error.tsx files at the following locations: app/admin/orders/[id]/error.tsx, app/track/[id]/error.tsx, app/checkout/error.tsx, app/dashboard/error.tsx, app/account/error.tsx. Each should be a 'use client' component that shows a user-friendly error message with a retry button (calling reset()). Follow a consistent pattern: show an error icon, a heading like 'Something went wrong', the error message (if available), and a 'Try again' button. Use the app's existing Tailwind design language (rounded-2xl, font-black, text-slate-900, etc.).

CACHE REVALIDATION (Item 5): In app/api/admin/offers/route.ts POST handler, add `import { revalidatePath, revalidateTag } from 'next/cache'` and after successful offer creation call `revalidatePath('/offers')` and `revalidateTag('offers')`. In app/api/admin/offers/[id]/route.ts PUT and DELETE handlers, add the same revalidation calls after successful mutation. In app/api/admin/promo-codes/route.ts POST handler, add revalidation after creation: `revalidatePath('/offers')` and `revalidateTag('offers')`. In app/api/admin/promo-codes/[id]/route.ts PATCH and DELETE handlers, add the same revalidation calls.

FORCE-DYNAMIC (Item 6): In app/admin/orders/[id]/page.tsx, add `export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';` at the top level (after imports, before the component). This page uses requirePermission + auth but is missing the explicit dynamic export.
acceptance_criteria: No mojibake characters exist in source files (confirmed via grep)
error.tsx exists at: app/admin/orders/[id]/, app/track/[id]/, app/checkout/, app/dashboard/, app/account/
Each error.tsx is a 'use client' component with reset() functionality
Admin offer POST/PUT/DELETE routes call revalidatePath('/offers') and revalidateTag('offers')
Admin promo-code POST/PATCH/DELETE routes call revalidatePath('/offers') and revalidateTag('offers')
